_comment: 破壁 / GlobalInfo — X 收藏 channel (常驻精选, not lookback-gated). Your saved tweets from X. Workflow: send Claude the bookmarked tweet links; Claude reads each tweet, records the REAL tweet date (DATE RULE — never fabricate 'now'; if the date can't be recovered, skip the item), the tweet text as 原文 (descEn), and writes a faithful 中文 summary (summaryZh). 绝不编造、永远链接原文、不给买卖建议. The builder (scripts/lib/curated.mjs fetchXBookmarks) turns each into a link-style read-queue item; summaryZh present → ships enriched, the translator skips it.

_schema.source: tweet author handle WITH @, e.g. @karpathy — this is the subscription key (sourceKeyOf)
_schema.sourceZh: author display name shown in the list (Chinese name or plain name)
_schema.title: short 中文 gist of the tweet (tweets have no title; craft a faithful one-line title)
_schema.date: real tweet date YYYY-MM-DD — never invent
_schema.summaryZh: faithful Chinese summary of the tweet
_schema.descEn: the tweet's original English text (原文)
_schema.enabled: optional; set false to hide without deleting
